<div data-cms-block="storefront/product-info" data-attrs=""></div>

![Garden Mix](images/02-garden-mix.jpg)

The bouquet our regulars buy on Friday afternoons. We don't pre-plan it: we go to market, pick what's most beautiful that morning, and let the season decide. Sage greens, dusty pinks, soft creams — always.

## What's in it

- Whatever was best at market
- Always seasonal, always English-grown when possible
- Never dyed, never glittered

## Care

Re-trim stems on day three, change water every other day, snip any tired blooms to extend the life of the rest.
